name: Post-Processing
description: Add a bloom post-processing pass to the scene. Success: no runtime exceptions + screenshot non-empty.

tasks.name: Add bloom post-processing pass
tasks.prompt: Add a THREE.UnrealBloomPass post-processing pass to the scene in src/main.js. Use an EffectComposer with a RenderPass followed by the bloom pass. Choose reasonable bloom parameters (strength 0.8, radius 0.4, threshold 0.85). Call triangle_capture_screenshot to confirm the render is non-empty and triangle_describe_scene to confirm no runtime exceptions. Report what you changed.
tasks.setup: A project with a basic Three.js scene in src/main.js (no existing post-processing).

successCriteria.description: No runtime exceptions after adding the pass and the screenshot is non-empty.
